column_lineage.expression: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY combined.courserun_readable_id, combined.coursestructure_block_index, combined.coursestructure_retrieved_at ORDER BY sequentials.coursestructure_block_index DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY platform, openedx_user_id, courserun_readable_id, problem_block_fk, attempt ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course.block_id, JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(t.topic, 'id') ORDER BY JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(t.topic, 'sort_key') ASC /* noqa */)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY block_id ORDER BY is_latest DESC, retrieved_at DESC)

CASE WHEN NOT JSON_QUERY_STRING('useractivity_event_object', "'$.id'") LIKE 'block-v1%' THEN REGEXP_EXTRACT(JSON_QUERY_STRING('useractivity_event_object', "'$.id'"), 'block-v1.*') ELSE JSON_QUERY_STRING('useractivity_event_object', "'$.id'") END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY platform, openedx_user_id, courserun_readable_id, problem_block_id, attempt ORDER BY event_timestamp)

CASE WHEN user_is_active_on_mitxonline AND user_joined_on_mitxonline > user_joined_on_edxorg THEN user_mitxonline_email ELSE COALESCE(user_edxorg_email, user_mitxonline_email, user_micromasters_email) END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_pk ORDER BY GREATEST(user_joined_on_mitlearn, user_joined_on_mitxonline, user_joined_on_edxorg, user_joined_on_mitxpro, user_joined_on_residential) DESC)
SUM(CASE WHEN tfact_video_events.event_type = 'play_video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
SUM(CASE WHEN tfact_video_events.event_type = 'complete_video' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
MIN(CASE WHEN event_type = 'play_video' THEN (CASE WHEN video_position = 'null' THEN '0' END) END)
LEAD(canvas_object_id) OVER (PARTITION BY session_id, block_id ORDER BY event_timestamp)

CASE WHEN NOT redeemed_coupons.coupon_id IS NULL OR NOT redeemed_b2b_coupons.b2bcoupon_id IS NULL THEN TRUE WHEN redeemed_coupons.coupon_id IS NULL AND redeemed_b2b_coupons.b2bcoupon_id IS NULL THEN FALSE END
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ecommerce_productversion.product_id ORDER BY ecommerce_productversion.productversion_updated_on DESC)
CASE WHEN problem_response.most_recent_num = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_readable_id, user_username, useractivity_problem_id ORDER BY useractivity_problem_attempts DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_readable_id, user_username, useractivity_problem_id ORDER BY useractivity_problem_attempts DESC)
RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY flexiblepriceapplication_updated_on DESC)
CASE WHEN final_combined_programs.capstone_sum > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
CAST(AGE(CAST('day' AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(final_combined_programs.programcertificate_created_on_date AS TIMESTAMP)) AS BIGINT)
SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(combined_enrollments.course_title) LIKE '%CAPSTONE%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
CASE WHEN program_stats.cert_count > 0 THEN TRUE END
CASE WHEN program_stats.dedp_program_cred_count > 0 THEN TRUE END

SUM(CASE WHEN program_title IN ('Data, Economics, and Design of Policy', 'Data, Economics, and Design of Policy: International Development', 'Data, Economics, and Design of Policy: Public Policy') AND NOT programcertificate_uuid IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

STRUCT(STRUCT(GENERATE_HASH_ID('cast(order_id as varchar)
        || cast(coalesce(line_id, 9) as varchar)
        || platform')))

mitxonline__ecommerce_order.discount_amount_text /* --In MITx Online, there are two transactions for an refunded order. */ /* --Here we picked the refund transaction ID and auth code until we change the unique key */

STRUCT(STRUCT(GENERATE_HASH_ID('cast(order_id as varchar)
        || cast(coalesce(line_id, 9) as varchar)
        || platform')))

CASE WHEN NOT user_id IS NULL THEN GENERATE_HASH_ID('user_id || platform') WHEN NOT user_email IS NULL THEN GENERATE_HASH_ID('user_email || platform') ELSE GENERATE_HASH_ID('user_full_name || platform') END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, courserun_id ORDER BY order_created_on DESC)
COALESCE(CASE WHEN NOT mitxonline_order_sum.discount_code IS NULL THEN TRUE END, FALSE)

CASE WHEN discount_type = 'percent-off' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT('%.2f', mitxonline_discount.discount_amount), '%') WHEN discount_type = 'dollars-off' THEN CONCAT('$', FORMAT('%.2f', mitxonline_discount.discount_amount)) WHEN discount_type = 'fixed-price' THEN CONCAT('Fixed Price: ', FORMAT('%.2f', mitxonline_discount.discount_amount)) END
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN order_state = 'fulfilled' THEN order_id END)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_username, platform ORDER BY openedx_user_id ASC)

CASE WHEN "date program certificate awarded" = 'null' THEN NULL /* noqa: ST10 */ ELSE COALESCE(TO_ISO8601(DATE_PARSE("date program certificate awarded", '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%sZ')), TO_ISO8601(DATE_PARSE("date program certificate awarded", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s Z'))) /* Try parsing once and handle both formats */ END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "user id", "course run key", "program uuid" ORDER BY _airbyte_extracted_at DESC, _ab_source_file_last_modified DESC)
LAG(course_block_source.course_content_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY course_block_source.block_id, course_block_source.course_id ORDER BY course_block_source.retrieved_at ASC)
DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY course_id ORDER BY _ab_source_file_last_modified DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id, course_id ORDER BY _airbyte_extracted_at DESC)

CASE WHEN company_size = 1 THEN 'Small/Start-up (1+ employees)' WHEN company_size = 9 THEN 'Small/Home office (1-9 employees)' WHEN company_size = 99 THEN 'Small (10-99 employees)' WHEN company_size = 999 THEN 'Small to medium-sized (100-999 employees)' WHEN company_size = 9999 THEN 'Medium-sized (1000-9999 employees)' WHEN company_size = 10000 THEN 'Large Enterprise (10,000+ employees)' WHEN company_size = 0 THEN 'Other (N/A or Don''t know)' ELSE CAST(company_size AS VARCHAR) END

CASE WHEN years_experience = 2 THEN 'Less than 2 years' WHEN years_experience = 5 THEN '2-5 years' WHEN years_experience = 10 THEN '6 - 10 years' WHEN years_experience = 15 THEN '11 - 15 years' WHEN years_experience = 20 THEN '16 - 20 years' WHEN years_experience = 21 THEN 'More than 20 years' WHEN years_experience = 0 THEN 'Prefer not to say' ELSE CAST(years_experience AS VARCHAR) END
CONCAT_WS(CHR(10), NULLIF(street_address_1, ''), NULLIF(street_address_2, ''), NULLIF(street_address_3, ''), NULLIF(street_address_4, ''), NULLIF(street_address_5, ''))
CASE WHEN is_revoked = FALSE THEN CONCAT('https://bootcamps.mit.edu/certificate/', uuid) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN LOWER(org) = 'mitx' THEN 'MITx' ELSE org END
LAG(course_block_source.course_content_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY course_block_source.block_id, course_block_source.course_id ORDER BY course_block_source.retrieved_at ASC)
CASE WHEN NOT publish_date IS NULL AND unpublish_status IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
CASE WHEN NOT publish_date IS NULL AND unpublish_status = 'succeeded' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
CASE WHEN publish_date IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
CASE WHEN NOT publish_date IS NULL AND unpublish_status IS NULL THEN CONCAT('var("ocw_production_url")', url_path) ELSE NULL END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_id ORDER BY _airbyte_extracted_at DESC)
SUBSTRING(readable_id FROM ((POSITION('+' IN readable_id)) + 1) FOR (POSITION('x' IN SUBSTRING(readable_id FROM POSITION('+' IN readable_id))) - 2))
certificate_page_revision_id /* - rename it after the referenced model is created */
LAG(course_block_source.course_content_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY course_block_source.block_id, course_block_source.course_id ORDER BY course_block_source.retrieved_at ASC)
certificate_page_revision_id /* - rename it after the referenced model is created */
CASE WHEN is_revoked = FALSE THEN CONCAT('https://xpro.mit.edu/certificate/', uuid) ELSE NULL END
SUBSTRING(readable_id FROM ((POSITION('+' IN readable_id)) + 1) FOR (POSITION('x' IN SUBSTRING(readable_id FROM POSITION('+' IN readable_id))) - 2))
CONCAT_WS(CHR(10), NULLIF(street_address_1, ''), NULLIF(street_address_2, ''), NULLIF(street_address_3, ''), NULLIF(street_address_4, ''), NULLIF(street_address_5, ''))
CASE WHEN discount_type = 'dollars-off' THEN CONCAT('$', FORMAT('%.2f', amount)) WHEN discount_type = 'percent-off' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT('%.2f', amount * 100), '%') END
CASE WHEN has_courseware_url = TRUE THEN CONCAT('var("mitxonline_openedx_url")', '/learn/course/', courseware_id, '/home') ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN courseware_id LIKE 'MITx/%' OR courseware_id LIKE 'course-v1:MITx+%' THEN 'var("edxorg")' ELSE 'var("mitxonline")' END
certificate_page_revision_id /* - rename it after the referenced model is created */

CASE WHEN discount_type = 'percent-off' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT('%.2f', amount), '%') WHEN discount_type = 'dollars-off' THEN CONCAT('$', FORMAT('%.2f', amount)) WHEN discount_type = 'fixed-price' THEN CONCAT('Fixed Price: ', FORMAT('%.2f', amount)) END
CASE WHEN LOWER(org) = 'mitxt' THEN 'MITxT' ELSE org END
LAG(course_block_source.course_content_hash) OVER (PARTITION BY course_block_source.block_id, course_block_source.course_id ORDER BY course_block_source.retrieved_at ASC)
CASE WHEN is_revoked = FALSE THEN CONCAT('https://mitxonline.mit.edu/certificate/', uuid) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN change_status = '' THEN NULL ELSE change_status END

CASE WHEN amount_type = 'fixed-discount' THEN CONCAT('$', FORMAT('%.2f', amount)) WHEN amount_type = 'fixed-price' THEN CONCAT('Fixed Price: ', FORMAT('%.2f', amount)) WHEN amount_type = 'percent-discount' THEN CONCAT(FORMAT('%.2f', amount * 100), '%') END
CASE WHEN passing_score < 1 THEN passing_score * 100 ELSE passing_score END
CASE WHEN edx_course_key LIKE 'MITx/%' THEN SPLIT(edx_course_key, '/')[3] WHEN edx_course_key LIKE 'course-v1:%' THEN SPLIT(edx_course_key, '+')[3] END
CASE WHEN courseware_backend = 'mitxonline' THEN 'var("mitxonline")' WHEN courseware_backend = 'edxorg' THEN 'var("edxorg")' ELSE courseware_backend END

CASE WHEN account_privacy = 'public' THEN 'Public to everyone' WHEN account_privacy = 'public_to_mm' THEN 'Public to logged in users' WHEN account_privacy = 'private' THEN 'Private' ELSE account_privacy END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY certificate_page_id, signatory_ids ORDER BY wagtailcore_revision_id DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY edx_certificate.user_email ORDER BY mitx_user.user_joined_on_edxorg DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT final_exam_grouping.openedx_user_id IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
SUM(CASE WHEN courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode = 'verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

LAG(problem_events.event_timestamp, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY problem_events.platform, problem_events.openedx_user_id, problem_events.courserun_readable_id, cc.parent_block_id ORDER BY problem_events.event_timestamp)
COALESCE(UPPER(unit_name) LIKE '%FINAL EXAM%' OR UPPER(chapter_name) LIKE '%FINAL EXAM%', FALSE)
MAX(CASE WHEN problem_engagement.num_of_attempts > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(t.element, 'type') = 'AIMessage' THEN JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(t.element, 'content') END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY chatsession_thread_id, human_message, agent_message ORDER BY tutorbotoutput_id, message_index)
COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_correct_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END))
COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END))

CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_correct_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END)) AS DECIMAL(30, 10)) / CAST(MAX(problems_in_block.problem_numb) AS DECIMAL(30, 10))

CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END)) AS DECIMAL(30, 10)) / CAST(MAX(problems_in_block.problem_numb) AS DECIMAL(30, 10))
MIN(CASE WHEN event_type = 'play_video' THEN video_position END)
CASE WHEN enrollments.platform = 'var("mitxonline")' THEN CONCAT('https://mitxonline.mit.edu/orders/receipt/', CAST(orders.order_id AS VARCHAR)) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN courses_detail.capstone_sum > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
CAST(AGE(CAST('day' AS TIMESTAMP), CAST(courses_detail.first_courserun_start_on_date AS TIMESTAMP)) AS BIGINT)
SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(courses_in_program.course_title) LIKE '%CAPSTONE%' AND course_enrollment_detail.courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode = 'verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
MIN(CASE WHEN course_enrollment_detail.courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode = 'verified' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(course_enrollment_detail.courserun_start_on FROM 1 FOR 10) AS DATE) END)
CASE WHEN dedp_indicators.Any_DEDP_Program_Indicator = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN dedp_indicators.DEDP_International_Program_Indicator = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN dedp_indicators.DEDP_Public_Policy_Program_Indicator = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN program_title = 'Data, Economics, and Design of Policy: International Development' THEN user_hashed_id ELSE NULL END)
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN program_title = 'Data, Economics, and Design of Policy: Public Policy' THEN user_hashed_id ELSE NULL END)
CASE WHEN NOT enroll_activity.user_email IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
CASE WHEN NOT any_activity.user_email IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
MIN(CASE WHEN video_events.event_type = 'play_video' THEN video_events.video_position END)
LAG(CAST(video_events.event_timestamp AS DATE)) OVER (PARTITION BY user.email, video_events.courserun_readable_id, video_events.video_block_fk ORDER BY CAST(video_events.event_timestamp AS DATE))
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY chatsession.chatsession_object_id ORDER BY video.retrieved_at ASC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, program_uuid ORDER BY program_certificate_awarded_on DESC, courserunenrollment_created_on DESC)
COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END))

CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT (CASE WHEN CAST(f_problem_engagement.num_of_attempts AS INT) > 0 THEN f_problem_engagement.problem_block_fk ELSE NULL END)) AS DECIMAL(30, 10)) / CAST(MAX(problems_in_block.problem_numb) AS DECIMAL(30, 10))
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, program_uuid ORDER BY program_certificate_awarded_on DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT latest_course_structure_date.max_retrieved_date IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_structure.courserun_readable_id, course_structure.coursestructure_block_index, course_structure.coursestructure_retrieved_at ORDER BY chapters.coursestructure_block_index DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY user_email_opt_in_updated_on DESC)
CASE WHEN user_email LIKE 'retired__user%' OR user_username LIKE 'retired__user%' THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END

CASE WHEN is_mitxonline_user = TRUE THEN GENERATE_HASH_ID("cast(user_mitxonline_id as varchar) || 'MITx Online'") WHEN is_edxorg_user = TRUE THEN GENERATE_HASH_ID("cast(user_edxorg_id as varchar) || 'edX.org'") END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_username ORDER BY openedx_user_id ASC, user_joined_on DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT latest_course_structure_date.max_retrieved_date IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_structure.courserun_readable_id, course_structure.coursestructure_block_index, course_structure.coursestructure_retrieved_at ORDER BY chapters.coursestructure_block_index DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRIM(course_number) ORDER BY courserun_start_date DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY video_title ORDER BY video_created_on DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY courserunenrollment_created_on DESC)
CASE WHEN orders.order_state IN ('fulfilled', 'refunded') THEN couponredemption.couponredemption_created_on END
CASE WHEN NOT enrollments.ecommerce_order_id IS NULL THEN 'no-id-professional' ELSE openedx_enrollments.courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode END
CASE WHEN NOT latest_course_structure_date.max_retrieved_date IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_structure.courserun_readable_id, course_structure.coursestructure_block_index, course_structure.coursestructure_retrieved_at ORDER BY chapters.coursestructure_block_index DESC)
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_courserun' THEN products.product_object_id END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_program' THEN products.product_object_id END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_courserun' THEN 'course run' WHEN 'courses_program' THEN 'program' ELSE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY productversion.product_id ORDER BY productversion.productversion_updated_on DESC)
CASE WHEN certificates.programcertificate_is_revoked = FALSE THEN CONCAT('https://xpro.mit.edu/certificate/program/', certificates.programcertificate_uuid) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN NOT latest_ecommerce_couponversion.max_couponversion_updated_on IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
CASE WHEN edxendpoints.edxendpoint_base_url = 'var("mitxonline_openedx_url")' THEN 'var("mitxonline")' WHEN edxendpoints.edxendpoint_base_url = 'var("mitxpro_openedx_url")' THEN 'var("mitxpro")' END
* /* - there may be multiple encodejobs for the same video, but we only need the last one for video duration */
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY video_id ORDER BY encodejob_created_on DESC)
CASE operator_nodes.programrequirement_operator WHEN 'min_number_of' THEN 'Elective' WHEN 'all_of' THEN 'Core' END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_nodes.course_id, course_nodes.program_id ORDER BY LENGTH(operator_nodes.programrequirement_path) DESC)
SUM(CASE WHEN programrequirement_type = 'Core' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

CASE WHEN NOT dedp_enrollments_verified.user_id IS NULL AND NOT dedp_enrollments_verified.courserun_id IS NULL AND enrollments.courserunenrollment_enrollment_status IS NULL THEN 'verified' ELSE enrollments.courserunenrollment_enrollment_mode END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_courserun' THEN products.product_object_id END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_program' THEN products.product_object_id END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_courserun' THEN 'course run' WHEN 'courses_program' THEN 'program' END
CASE WHEN email_optout.email_optout_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN certificates.programcertificate_is_revoked = FALSE THEN CONCAT('https://mitxonline.mit.edu/certificate/program/', certificates.programcertificate_uuid) ELSE NULL END
CASE contenttypes.contenttype_full_name WHEN 'courses_course' THEN 'course' WHEN 'courses_program' THEN 'program' END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_readable_id, coursestructure_block_id ORDER BY coursestructure_retrieved_at DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT subsection_grade_overrides.subsectiongradeoverride_id IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY program_requirements.course_id ORDER BY programs.program_is_micromasters)
CASE WHEN orders.order_state IN ('fulfilled', 'refunded') THEN discountredemptions.discountredemption_timestamp END

CASE WHEN discounts.discount_type = 'percent-off' THEN CAST(intermediate_products_view.product_price * (discounts.discount_amount / 100) AS DECIMAL(38, 2)) ELSE CAST(discounts.discount_amount AS DECIMAL(38, 2)) END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY order_id ORDER BY discountredemption_timestamp DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY video_title ORDER BY video_created_on DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT latest_course_structure_date.max_retrieved_date IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY course_structure.courserun_readable_id, course_structure.coursestructure_block_index, course_structure.coursestructure_retrieved_at ORDER BY chapters.coursestructure_block_index DESC)

CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN mitxonline_programenrollments.program_id = VAR("dedp_mitxonline_public_policy_program_id") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN VAR("dedp_mitxonline_public_policy_program_id") WHEN mitxonline_courseruns.courserun_start_on < TO_ISO8601(CAST('var("dedp_mitxonline_good_economics_for_hard_times_internation_development_cutoff")' AS DATE)) THEN VAR("dedp_mitxonline_international_development_program_id") END
CASE WHEN NOT combined_certificates.courseruncertificate_url IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
CASE WHEN residential_grades.courserungrade_letter_grade <> '' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY combined_courseroles.hashed_user_email, combined_courseroles.platform ORDER BY combined_courseroles.user_email DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_external_readable_id ORDER BY courserun_start_on DESC, courserun_end_on DESC, enrollment_created_on DESC)

CASE WHEN NOT user_mitxonline_username IS NULL THEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_readable_id, user_mitxonline_username, mitxonline_program_id ORDER BY courseruncertificate_created_on DESC) ELSE 1 END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, micromasters_program_id ORDER BY program_title)

CASE WHEN NOT mitxonline_programs.program_id IS NULL THEN mitxonline_programs.program_readable_id ELSE GENERATE_MICROMASTERS_PROGRAM_READABLE_ID('report.micromasters_program_id', 'report.program_title') END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_profile_id ORDER BY user_graduation_date DESC)
CASE WHEN orders.order_state IN ('fulfilled', 'refunded') THEN redeemedcoupons.redeemedcoupon_created_on END
CASE WHEN coupons.coupon_amount_type = 'percent-discount' THEN CAST(lines.line_price * coupons.coupon_amount AS DECIMAL(38, 2)) ELSE CAST(coupons.coupon_amount AS DECIMAL(38, 2)) END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY order_id ORDER BY receipt_created_on DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_grades.user_id, courseruns.course_id ORDER BY courserun_grades.courserungrade_grade DESC, courserun_grades.coursegrade_created_on DESC)
CASE WHEN NOT user_mitxonline_username IS NULL THEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_readable_id, user_mitxonline_username, mitxonline_program_id ORDER BY created_on DESC) ELSE 1 END
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY edxorg_auth.user_id ORDER BY edxorg_users.user_last_login DESC)
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY courserun_grades.user_id, courseruns.course_id ORDER BY courserun_grades.courserungrade_grade DESC, courserun_grades.coursegrade_created_on DESC)
